staticCommands.description: Creates c# classes from a Contentful content model.

options.description: The Contentful API key for the Content Delivery API
The environment to fetch the content model from
Automatically overwrite files that already exist
The namespace the classes should be created in
Path to the file or directory to create files in
The space id to fetch content types from
